posts.author: Lorenzo
posts.text:
Full guide on ads that don't look like ads (for $1M months).

Organic ads, ugly ads, stealth ads, all are the same. But they all work in 2026. ONLY if they're created in order to fit into your customers' feed.
posts.why: A full tactical guide on native-feeling ad creative. Directly useful for the Meta work.

posts.author: Alex Fedotoff
posts.text:
NOTHING holds spend like VSLs on Facebook.

Most ads will never survive the testing phase.

99% of the ads you test will never spend more than $10k at KPI.

VSL's can spend $50-$100K+. Return of time/resources is definitely positive. Swipe file of VSL bangers below, enjoy
posts.why: Ads tactics with real substance: a specific format claim plus a swipe file.

posts.author: Max Sturtevant
posts.text:
We've been working on custom dashboards that show retention data you literally cannot see inside of Shopify, Klaviyo, Recharge, Skio, etc.

For example this view right here tracks cohort LTV broken down by whatever you want: product, customer tag, discount code, etc.
posts.why: Retention and cohort-LTV visibility beyond what Shopify and Klaviyo show. Relevant to all three stores.

posts.author: DTC Newsletter
posts.text:
Having a good tech stack is important.

This episode, we're taking you to the Whalies Panel with Justin Parker (Origin), Ashley Kick (DOEN), and Martha Ann Pavoni (Universal Ads). Justin unpacks how their brands are embedding Triple Whale's Moby AI across the commerce stack.
posts.why: AI embedded in the ecommerce stack, discussed by operators running real brands.

posts.author: Alex Fedotoff
posts.text:
MFers that listen to me are printing.

154 active ads in Mexico. Selling a validated in the USA supplement product: Astaxanthin.

Basic bitch product page. Find the product, adapt to your market, print.
posts.why: Concrete market-arbitrage play with numbers. Pitchy for his tool, but the tactic stands alone.

posts.author: Lorenzo
posts.text:
hired a media buyer. sharp kid. spent his whole first month learning our launch process, has spent every month since just running it.

Thought a better SOP would make him more efficient. So I wrote one (38 pages).

He hasn't even opened it.

"your process becomes code that
posts.why: Process-as-code over SOP documents. Speaks straight to the AI-agent business.

posts.author: Sean Frank
posts.text:
im quitting this "rich and famous and powerful ceo" shit

im going all in on tik tok shop affiliate ugc

ive already made tens of dollars

break out of the matrix

buy the wallet, then buy my course on how to sell courses
posts.why: DTC founder satire of course-seller slop. Borderline keep, vote it to calibrate the satire rule.
